task_summary: SP21g is a fresh retry of the bounded mew-wisp display-polish slice after task #27/session #56 was blocked by issue #20. It centers normal --format human --form cat terminal output for the 22x24 block-cell cat sprite relative to terminal width, with deterministic forced-width behavior for tests and non-TTY fallback. The cat state line, sprite, and post-silhouette state marker stay visually aligned as one centered cat block while the metadata/HUD remains readable. The slice preserves compact HUD behavior, --details diagnostics, --form default, state JSON, HTML, watch behavior, live-read gates, launcher safety, and cat sprite similarity coverage.
proof_artifacts: applied focused test edit and pytest verification tool #1167

verification_evidence.summary: 38 passed after applying the SP21g centered-cat renderer and focused test edits.

implemented_contract.fresh_retry_scope: SP21g was implemented as a fresh retry under experiments/mew-ghost only after task #27/session #56 was blocked by issue #20.
implemented_contract.cat_terminal_centering: --format human --form cat centers the 22x24 terminal cat sprite block relative to the detected terminal width when there is room for padding.
implemented_contract.deterministic_width_fallback: Tests can force terminal width deterministically through the local CAT_TERMINAL_WIDTH_ENV override, while non-TTY or invalid-width output falls back to a stable width path without negative padding.
implemented_contract.narrow_width_safe: Narrow terminal widths do not add negative or broken padding; the sprite remains intact with no leading padding when the width is smaller than the cat block.
implemented_contract.state_marker_alignment: The cat state metadata line and post-silhouette state marker are padded with the same prefix as the sprite, keeping the marker outside the silhouette and visually aligned with the centered cat block.
implemented_contract.metadata_hud_readable: The compact terminal HUD remains after the cat block and continues to render focus, signal, and next-action metadata readably.
implemented_contract.diagnostics_stay_behind_details: Freshness, desk diagnostics, active-window details, and launcher intents remain opt-in behind --details.
implemented_contract.state_json_html_watch_preserved: The focused mew-ghost suite continues to cover state JSON, HTML, bounded/watch rendering, live-read gates, and launcher safety behavior.
implemented_contract.cat_sprite_similarity_preserved: The cat form continues to render a reference-like 22x24 block-cell sprite with similarity checks preserved.
implemented_contract.scope_limited: No mew connection work was added and cat.png was not touched.

covered_cases: forced wide terminal width pads cat state, sprite lines, and post-silhouette state marker consistently
forced narrow terminal width adds no padding and preserves the full sprite
human watch output with --form cat prints centered cat terminal surfaces for each bounded iteration
default human form remains compact and diagnostics remain hidden unless --details is passed
cat sprite similarity remains exactly reference-like in the focused tests
state JSON, HTML, live-read gates, and launcher safety remain covered by the focused mew-ghost test suite

acceptance_notes: All SP21g product, test, and report changes are scoped under experiments/mew-ghost.
README was not updated because the slice changes renderer polish and deterministic tests without changing documented CLI usage.
The local side-dogfood report records the SP21g practical retry evidence with rescue_edits=0.
remaining_risk: Final git diff/status inspection is still needed after the report write to summarize exact worktree scope and confirm cat.png remains untouched.
